heading: Definition
label: 9131 Definition
text: In this chapter, the term “enlistment” means original enlistment or reenlistment.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)8251[No source].[No source].The revised section is inserted for clarity.
